---
title: "TROPICAL_MAX_PLUS"
generated: true
description: "The max-plus tropical algebra :math:`( max, +)`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.semiring.algebras`](../nitrix-semiring-algebras.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:TROPICAL_MAX_PLUS -->
```python
TROPICAL_MAX_PLUS: StrictSemiring[Any] = StrictSemiring(monoid=(_MaxMonoid()), binary_op=(_SumSemigroup()), identity=(-jnp.inf), annihilator=(-jnp.inf), name='tropical_max_plus', matmul_vjp=tropical_max_plus_matmul_vjp, ell_matmul_vjp=tropical_max_plus_ell_matmul_vjp)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:TROPICAL_MAX_PLUS -->
The max-plus tropical algebra $(\max, +)$.

The monoid is maximisation and the binary operation is addition, with
identity and annihilator $-\infty$. Contractions compute
longest-path / best-score quantities; the backward pass gathers the
subgradient at the maximising index.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
